title: 25 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Mining Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
content:
## 25 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Mining Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
Toronto, October 23, 2023 – Lexpert has named 25 McCarthy Tétrault practitioners as “leading lawyers” in its Special Edition: Mining 2023, recognizing our firm’s significant industry experience and a relentless focus on achieving business objectives, managing risk and delivering value for our clients on their most complex mining matters.
In addition to the co-leaders of our Global Metals & Mining Group, Roger Taplin , Eva Bellissimo and Shea Small , the following McCarthy Tétrault lawyers were recognized as leading lawyers:
- Cameron G. Belsher, K.C.
- Christopher W. Langdon
- Dominique Amyot-Bilodeau
- Jennifer F. Longhurst
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
Access the Lexpert Special Edition: Mining 2023 publication.
Our Global Metals & Mining Group
Our Global Metals & Mining Group has been at the forefront of multi-jurisdictional M&A, alternative financing structures, major project developments and high-stakes litigation. We blend a deep bench of top-tier lawyers with significant industry experience and a relentless focus on achieving business objectives, managing risk and delivering value for our clients. We are trusted advisers to many of the global majors and our broad client base includes mid-tier and junior mining companies as well as streamers, lenders, private equity, strategic investors, traders and SOEs. Learn more about our Global Metals & Mining Group.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
